# Linear Regression, the Mother Model {#sec-01-linear-regression}

::: {.callout-warning}
**Chapter stub.** This chapter is planned but not yet written. The abstract below is its
contract; drafting sources are listed for provenance.
:::

*Fitting a line is the smallest complete example of learning: a model, a loss, and a way to improve. We build it three times — closed form, gradient descent, and `nn.Linear` — and meet every character of the rest of the book.*

<!-- draft-sources
seeds:
- `sources/1_1_lin_Recap.tex`
transcripts:
- `m01_lecture-1-from-linear-regression-to-neural-netwo_-bdoWPWjyTc.txt`
- `[coding]_m01_lecture-1-2-linear-regression-via-neural-network_WOFb8EKAy7I.txt`
-->
